subject: Cloud Computing
title: The Pandemic and Cloud Demand
description: A quick win: understand The Pandemic and Cloud Demand.

hook.text: In March 2020, the world went remote overnight. Cloud usage surged 775% in some regions.

buildup.text: Zoom jumped from 10 million daily users to 300 million in three months — all on the cloud.

discovery.text: Without cloud computing, remote work at pandemic scale would have been physically impossible.

twist.text: Cloud providers struggled too. AWS, Azure, and Google all faced capacity crunches in early 2020.

climax.text: The pandemic proved the cloud wasn't optional. It was critical global infrastructure.

punchline.text: COVID didn't create the cloud era. It proved we were in one.

quiz.question: How did the 2020 pandemic affect cloud computing?
options: Demand surged as remote work made cloud services essential
Cloud usage dropped because businesses shut down
Companies moved off the cloud to save money during the recession
